recommendations.title: Three Times
recommendations.overview: In three separate segments, set respectively in 1966, 1911, and 2005, three love stories unfold between three sets of characters, under three different periods of Taiwanese history and governance.

recommendations.title: Millennium Mambo
recommendations.overview: Vicky recalls her romances with her exes Hao Hao and Jack in the neon-lit clubs of Taipei.

recommendations.title: A City of Sadness
recommendations.overview: The story of a family embroiled in the "White Terror," the Kuomintang government's anti-communist political repression that was wrought on the Taiwanese people from 1947-1987.

recommendations.title: The Time to Live and the Time to Die
recommendations.overview: An autobiographical film based on Taiwanese director Hou Hsiao-hsien's memories of his youth growing up in Taiwan after emigrating from mainland China.

recommendations.title: The Assassin
recommendations.overview: 9th century China. Ten year old general’s daughter Nie Yinniang is abducted by a nun who initiates her into the martial arts, transforming her into an exceptional assassin charged with eliminating cruel and corrupt local governors. One day, having fa

recommendations.title: Flowers of Shanghai
recommendations.overview: At the end of the 19th century, Shanghai is divided into several foreign concessions. In the British concession, a number of luxurious “flower houses” are reserved for the male elite of the city. Since Chinese dignitaries are not allowed to frequent

recommendations.title: To All the Boys I've Loved Before
recommendations.overview: Lara Jean's love life goes from imaginary to out of control when her secret letters to every boy she's ever fallen for are mysteriously mailed out.

recommendations.title: Memoir of a Murderer
recommendations.overview: A former serial killer with Alzheimer's fights to protect his daughter from her mysterious boyfriend who may be a serial killer too.

recommendations.title: A Company Man
recommendations.overview: A contract killer becomes disenchanted with his line of work and spares the lives of his two latest would-be-victims. But the assassination company he works for has no intentions of letting him quit.

recommendations.title: Fighter in the Wind
